name: label-pie
description: Pie chart with value labels and leader lines for each segment

data.name: data
data.description: Array of data items for the pie slices. Example: [{value: 100, name: 'Category 1'}, {value: 200, name: 'Category 2'}]

radius.name: radius
radius.description: Radius of the pie chart as a percentage string. Example: '60%'

labelFormatter.name: labelFormatter
labelFormatter.description: Format string for the labels (e.g., '{b}: {c}' for name: value). Example: '{b}: {c}'

labelFontSize.name: labelFontSize
labelFontSize.description: Font size for the labels in pixels. Example: 12

width.name: width
width.description: Width of the chart in pixels. Example: 220

height.name: height
height.description: Height of the chart in pixels. Example: 350

theme.name: theme
theme.description: Partial theme override for customizing chart appearance. Example: {series: [{color: '#3b82f6'}]}
